channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Amazon Pulls Support for Perfectly Fine Older Kindles - WIRED
item.description:

  4. Samsung Users Have Looming Deadline To Make One Change—What To Do  Newsweek

item.title: Steam client files point to "framerate estimator" feature in the works - Ars Technica
item.description:
1. Steam client files point to "framerate estimator" feature in the works  Ars Technica
  2. Steam Will Estimate Game FPS Before Purchase to Show Expected PC Performance  TechPowerUp
  3. Steam starts gathering FPS data with latest client update — company to estimate framerates based on your hardware, Beta feature to focus on SteamOS devices  Tom's Hardware
  4. Steam wants to end the FPS guessing game before you buy  XDA
  5. Steam will soon let you know what FPS you'll get on a game before buying it  Gamereactor UK

item.title: Bluesky users are mastering the fine art of blaming everything on "vibe coding" - Ars Technica
item.description:
1. Bluesky users are mastering the fine art of blaming everything on "vibe coding"  Ars Technica
  2. Bluesky Outage: Thousands Of Users Said Site Isn’t Working  Forbes
  3. Is Bluesky Down Now? User Experiences Intermittent US East Outages Monday  International Business Times Australia
  4. Bluesky down for thousands of users in the US  The Economic Times
  5. Bluesky outage disrupts feeds across US, 2,200 user reports peak  NewsBytes
